title: schizorhiza neglecta
intro: Schizorhiza neglecta, also known as the Cape star flower or star flower, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The medicinal properties of Schizorhiza neglecta have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Schizorhiza neglecta can be made into infusions, teas, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
